findings.title: RAG latency spike detected
findings.symptom: latency_p95 increased after rag_slow incident was enabled
findings.root_cause: The retrieval step became slow because rag_slow introduced an artificial 2.5s delay

traces: Langfuse trace shows slow agent run/retrieval
logs: response_sent contains high latency_ms with same correlation_id

findings.fix: Optimize retrieval, add timeout, add caching, and monitor latency_p95

findings.title: Vector store timeout causes failed requests
findings.symptom: error_breakdown increased after tool_fail incident was enabled
findings.root_cause: The retrieval tool raised RuntimeError: Vector store timeout
findings.fix: Add retry, fallback response, timeout handling, and alert high_error_rate

findings.title: Cost spike caused by abnormal output tokens
findings.symptom: avg_cost_usd and tokens_out_total increased after cost_spike incident was enabled
findings.root_cause: The LLM generated four times more output tokens

traces: Langfuse usage_details shows higher output tokens
logs: response_sent event contains high tokens_out and cost_usd

findings.fix: Set max output token limit, shorten prompt, and alert on cost_budget_spike
